html:
2026-0331
2026-04-16GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Ratifying the Final Acts of the World Radiocommunication Conference of the International Telecommunication UnionOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Final Acts of the World Radiocommunication Conference of the International Telecommunication Union, adopted at the World Radiocommunication Conference held in Dubai from 20 November to 15 December 2023.N/A
subject: Order Ratifying the Final Acts of the World Radiocommunication Conference of the International Telecommunication Union
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Final Acts of the World Radiocommunication Conference of the International Telecommunication Union, adopted at the World Radiocommunication Conference held in Dubai from 20 November to 15 December 2023.
